response.justification: Bogdan has a credible 15+ year engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and systems domains, and his current Google role involving AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators is genuinely relevant to the position. However, the role operates at director-level scope — strategic customer advisory, shaping cloud product roadmaps, and externally recognized AI thought leadership — none of which the resume evidences. His AI focus is nascent (April 2025 onward), he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his trajectory reads as a strong senior-to-staff IC rather than a strategic principal with enterprise-facing influence.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, embedded systems, infrastructure, and developer tooling
Current Google role directly touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, aligning with the AI strategy focus
Entrepreneurial track record through open-source platform founding, public conference talks, and community-led workshops
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related field; recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI-native products are absent from the pre-2025 record
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, executive stakeholder engagement, or director-level organizational influence
Cloud experience appears limited to tooling consumption (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than cloud platform strategy or architecture leadership
